1. **Context Management is Paramount**: The most successful Claude Code users obsessively manage context through CLAUDE.md files, aggressive /clear usage, documentation systems (dev docs, living plans), and token-efficient tool design. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices (Anthropic), Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Getting\_Good\_Results, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Getting\_Good\_Results, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Getting\_Good\_Results, How\_Anthropic\_teams\_use, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Getting\_Good\_Results, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Building\_AI\_Factory. **Sources**: 6\_Weeks\_of\_Claude\_Code, what\_makes\_CC\_good, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature. ❌ Don't: @-file docs (embeds entire file on every run) ✅ Do: "For complex usage or FooBarError, see path/to/docs.md" ❌ Don't: "Never use --foo-bar flag" (agent gets stuck) ✅ Do: "Never use --foo-bar; prefer --baz instead" ❌ Don't: Write comprehensive manual ✅ Do: Document what Claude gets wrong. **Sources**: if\_youre\_not\_using\_these, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, if\_youre\_not\_using\_these, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, Design\_Partner. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, How\_Anthropic\_teams\_use. **Sources**: 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Building\_AI\_Factory, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, How\_I\_Use\_Every\_Feature. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, if\_youre\_not\_using\_these. **Sources**: what\_makes\_CC\_good, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, How\_Anthropic\_teams\_use, Poster\_Maker\_example. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Building\_AI\_Factory, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use. **Sources**: Ultimate\_AI\_Coding\_Guide, 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, Getting\_Good\_Results. **Sources**: Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices, Building\_AI\_Factory. **Sources**: 6\_months\_hardcore\_use, Claude\_Code\_Best\_Practices.

title: 💻 Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Mastering the Vibe: Claude Code Best Practices That Actually Work. If you’re ready to move beyond the “ask and pray” approach to something that actually works consistently, here’s what I’ve learned about making Claude Code genuinely useful. But the real power comes from asking Claude to make a plan before coding and explicitly telling it not to code until you’ve confirmed that its plan looks good. The biggest mental shift for me was stopping thinking of Claude Code as a tool and starting to think of it as a junior developer who’s incredibly fast but needs good direction. After implementing these practices consistently, my Claude Code sessions became dramatically more predictable and useful. Plan first, think appropriately hard, collaborate actively, and teach Claude about your specific context through .claude files. ## I Stopped Vibe Coding and Started “Prompt Contracts” — Claude Code Went From Gambling to Shipping. ### Anthropic just launched their Claude Code in Action course, and I’ve just passed — how about you?

title: 💻 Agentic Coding Best Practices with Claude Code - Tessl
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Back to articlesAgentic Coding Best Practices with Claude Code. # Agentic Coding Best Practices with Claude Code. We had been used to either going to ChatGPT or Claude to chat about code, or to open our IDEs to be — well integrated — with our codebase. With Claude Code we have something new, yet old… a terminal based solution that lets you chat and see code changes that you can accept or reject and refine. Anthropic have kindly shared their Claude Code: Best practices for agentic coding, which is a fantastic resource for understanding how best to work with an LLM for generating code (much more practical and useful than OpenAI’s practical guide to building agents resource!). Having used Claude Code and other tools for some time, I am finding workflows that work for me. ### Configuring Claude Code. 20 Jun 2025### Unlocking Claude Code: Can Spec-Driven Development Elevate Your Workflow? ### Configuring Claude Code. 20 Jun 2025### Unlocking Claude Code: Can Spec-Driven Development Elevate Your Workflow?

title: 💻 [PDF] How Anthropic teams use Claude Code
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# </> Anthropic's internal teams are transforming their workflows with Claude Code, enabling developers and non-technical staff to tackle complex projects, automate tasks, and bridge skill gaps that previously limited their productivity. They use Claude Code for automating routine data engineering tasks, troubleshooting complex infrastructureissues,and creating documented workflows for technical and non-technical team members to access and manipulate data independently. When working with unfamiliar codebases (like the monorepo or API side), the team uses Claude Code to quickly understand how systems work. Claude Code enables these teams to build production-quality analytics dashboards without becoming full-stack developers. The team uses Claude Code as their "first stop" for any task, asking it to identify which files to examine for bug fixes, feature development, or analysis. As a non-technical team of one, they use Claude Code to automate repetitive marketing tasks and create agentic workflows that would traditionally require significant engineering resources.

title: 💻 Claude Code /simplify and /batch Commands Guide
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code /simplify and /batch: Bundled Commands That Ship Code Faster. Claude Code /simplify runs 3-agent code review on your changes. Boris Cherny, the Claude Code PM, put it well: these bundled commands "automate much of the work it used to take to shepherd a pull request to production." `/simplify` is the automated code review step between "it works" and "it's ready to merge.". Claude Code's `/batch` command orchestrates large-scale changes across your codebase in parallel. Each `/batch` worker automatically runs `/simplify` on its own changes before committing. `/simplify` and `/batch` are bundled Claude Code commands -- they ship with every installation and work out of the box. `/simplify` and `/batch` shipped in Claude Code v2.1.63. `/simplify` and `/batch` signal where Claude Code is headed: bundled multi-agent workflows that handle common engineering patterns out of the box. If you want a development framework with pre-built agent orchestration, custom slash commands, and multi-agent patterns that work alongside these bundled commands, the ClaudeFast Code Kit ships with 18 specialized agents and a pipeline designed for exactly this kind of workflow.
